cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Sean could have gone to the bakery. The key here is to look at all the times Sean was seen doing other activities and see when he was free. Also, we know the bakery was closed after 9pm, so whatever time he went has to be before that. First, let me list out all the times Sean was seen: - Sean woke up at 5am. That's just a starting point, not an activity. - James saw Sean in class from 5am to 6am. So from 5 to 6, he's in school. - Then David saw him buying lunch at the deli from 6am to 8am. So 6-8 am, he's at the deli. - Betty saw him at the mall from 8am to 9am. So 8-9 am, buying clothes. - Linda saw him on a rooftop from 9am to 5pm. That's a long time, 9 am to 5 pm. - Tiffany saw him driving to the water park from 8pm to 9pm. So 8-9 pm. The bakery was closed after 9 pm, so he had to go before that. Now, let's see the timeline: Let me break down the timeline: - 5am: wakes up - 5am-6am: in class - 6am-8am: deli - 8am-9am: mall - 9am-5pm: rooftop - 8pm-9pm: driving to water park So, when was Sean not doing any of these activities? Let's check the gaps between these times. Between waking up at 5am and class starting at 5am, there's no gap. He wakes up and immediately goes to class. After class (6am), he goes to the deli until 8am. Then to the mall 8-9am. Then rooftop 9am to 5pm. So from 5pm to 8pm, what's happening? The last activity before 8pm is Linda seeing him on the rooftop until 5pm. Then there's a gap from 5pm to 8pm. Then from 8pm to 9pm, he's driving to the water park. So the only time when Sean isn't accounted for is between 5pm and 8pm. Because after that, from 8pm-9pm he's at the water park, and the bakery is closed after 9pm. So during 5pm to 8pm, Sean was on the rooftop (until 5pm) and then free until he starts driving to the water park at 8pm. So between 5pm and 8pm, he could have gone to the bakery. The bakery is open until 9pm, so going between 5pm and 8pm is possible. Looking at the options: (A) 8pm to 9pm – but during this time, he was driving to the water park, and the bakery is closed after 9pm. So this is not possible. (B) 5pm to 8pm – this is the gap when he was on the rooftop until
